_about: Canonical ('gospel') appid map for restoring Wine/Proton prefixes backed up by the Linux Prefix Manager (Bazzite/SteamOS 'steamos_manager.sh' / 'backup_prefixes_incremental.sh'). NON-STEAM appids are arbitrary shortcut IDs that Steam re-randomises on every fresh install; pinning them here is what lets a restored prefix line up with its shortcut and saves forever. On restore, GFM must force the non-Steam shortcut's appid in shortcuts.vdf to the value below, then drop the backed-up prefix into steamapps/compatdata/<appid>. STEAM appids are permanent (Steam owns them) and are filled from the incoming 'prefix backups/<safe_name>/<appid>/' folder listing.

entries.name: The Crew
entries.notes: GOSPEL UPDATED 2026-07-10 to Tony's new working non-Steam appid 3585568980 (old was 3251365350 — its prefix went bad; he re-added TheCrew.exe fresh). The Crew save is data.bin IN the game folder not the prefix, so the prefix is disposable and re-pinning is safe. Recipe still carries real Steam appid 241560.

entries.name: TOCA Race Driver 3 (= V8 Supercars 3)
entries.notes: Tony confirms TOCA Race Driver 3 IS V8 Supercars 3; covered by v8-supercars-3 recipe (exe 'RD3 1.0.exe'). Map folder: Games/toca race driver 3

entries.name: Transformers: The Game
entries.notes: safe_name preserves the original CSV typo 'Transformeres'. Tony's copy is DRM-cracked abandonware (SafeDisc removed) so it launches under Proton — recipe = non-Steam shortcut + prefix restore + optional UE3 widescreen/resolution ini. Recipe-ready.

entries.name: Battlefield 2 (non-Steam)
entries.notes: MIGRATION TARGET = Steam-native BF2 appid 24860. Non-Steam folder Games/Battlefield 2 already has v1.5 patch + mods APPLIED in-place. Plan: copy_files the applied mod/patch files onto the Steam install (24860) backing up originals, AND migrate this prefix 3564688670 -> compatdata/24860 (profiles/saves under Documents/Battlefield 2/Profiles). NEED a listing of Games/Battlefield 2 to pin the exact payload files. CAVEAT: verify Steam BF2 24860 runs under Proton before committing (ProtonDB mixed).

entries.name: Watch Dogs
entries.notes: run as a non-Steam shortcut but using Watch Dogs' real Steam appid 243470 — recipe and prefix already agree

entries.name: Starfield (non-Steam copy)
entries.notes: NOT in latest backup AND not present in sd_map (2026-07-07) — non-Steam Starfield copy is not on the SD currently. Dormant.

entries.name: Star Wars Battlefront II (Kyber)
entries.notes: NOT in latest backup AND not in sd_map — only the Steam Battlefront variants (1237950, 2446550) are present, not this non-Steam Kyber copy. Dormant.

entries.name: Colin McRae Rally 2005
entries.notes: Game IS on the SD (Games/Colin McRae Rally 2005, unmatched in sd_map) but was not in the latest backup run — needs a detect block + exe, and confirm the prefix exists in the full backup copy

entries.name: Need for Speed: Rivals
entries.notes: Present as a real Steam entry on the SD (appmanifest 1262600, steamapps/common) — compatdata already keyed by 1262600, so restore = drop prefix back, no shortcut needed. Not in latest backup run though.

steam_pending._note: These Steam titles appeared in the latest backup log; their permanent Steam appids will be filled from the incoming 'prefix backups/' folder listing (folder name = appid). A few are already known from existing recipes.

known.name: Transformers: Rise of the Dark Spark
